[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../index.md) / [coffee/coffee.domain](../index.md) / registerCoffeeDomain

# registerCoffeeDomain()

```ts
function registerCoffeeDomain(server: McpServer): void;
```

Defined in: [coffee/coffee.domain.ts:21](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/4112cd2ee9b9b05525039f4b7b060594d2aa7744/src/app/coffee/coffee.domain.ts#L21)

Registers all coffee domain tool modules on the MCP server.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type        | Description                          |
| --------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------ |
| `server`  | `McpServer` | The MCP server to register tools on. |

## Returns

`void`

## Remarks

Creates a shared [InMemoryCoffeeRepository](../../shared/repository/coffee/coffee.repository/classes/InMemoryCoffeeRepository.md) and wires it into
the get-coffees and get-a-coffee module-service chains via
[registerGetCoffeesModule](../../get-coffees/module/get-coffees.module/functions/registerGetCoffeesModule.md) and [registerGetACoffeeModule](../../get-a-coffee/module/get-a-coffee.module/functions/registerGetACoffeeModule.md).
